chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1267 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of cases (Priority) 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4826/2022 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 22.03.2023 Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Zeeshan Hyder Qureshi, Law Officer, Election Commission of Pakistan Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional Advocate General Muhammad Mustaqeem Qureshi, Assistant Commissioner Faiz Ganj / Returning Officer GPS Mehar Ali Unar <><><><>..<><><><> Syed Jaffar Ali Shah, Advocate, files power on behalf of Respondents No.5 & 6 while learned Law Officer of Election Commission of Pakistan files copies of Notification dated 10.03.2023, letter dated 15.03.2023 and Office Memorandum for re-polling of Local Bodies Elections, whereby the Polling Staff has been deployed at Polling Station, GPS Mehar Ali Unar, which are taken on record. Copies of the documents so filed by the Law Officer of ECP are supplied to learned counsel for the petitioners as well as to Respondents No.5 & 6. Learned counsel for the petitioners after going through the same, does not press this Petition; however, seeks direction to Election Commission of Pakistan for deployment of Pakistan Rangers in order to maintain the law and order situation at the relevant Polling Station. In response, learned Law Officer appearing for Election Commission of Pakistan and learned Additional Advocate General state that at least 01 DSP and 02 Police Inspectors along with sufficient

Learned counsel for the petitioners after going through the same, does not press this Petition; however, seeks direction to Election Commission of Pakistan for deployment of Pakistan Rangers in order to maintain the law and order situation at the relevant Polling Station. In response, learned Law Officer appearing for Election Commission of Pakistan and learned Additional Advocate General state that at least 01 DSP and 02 Police Inspectors along with sufficient (C.P No.D-1267/2022) Page 2 of 2 police staff shall be deployed at the said Polling Station to ensure the law and order situation on the polling day. In view of the above, the instant Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. Office is directed to supply copy of this order to learned Additional Advocate General for compliance. Judge Judge ARBROHI
